CustomField.description: For highlighting cells in the Grading Wizard when a Status is selected. Store the status picklist value=background hex color #code in semicolon separated value, e.g., Late=#ff0000;Missing=#AF9403;Excused=#c1c1c1
CustomField.inlineHelpText: For highlighting cells in the Grading Wizard when a Status is selected. Store the status picklist value=background hex color #code in semicolon separated value, e.g., Late=#ff0000;Missing=#AF9403;Excused=#c1c1c1
CustomField.label: Grade Item Status Background Colours
